# Unovie.AI

> AI-engineering studio that designs, builds and operates custom edge-AI systems — fixed scope, fixed cost, on hardware you own. Built on the Nexus Context Platform: a typed knowledge graph + vector memory, edge GPU serving, and self-learning agents, all on-prem.

## Solutions
- [Smart Factory Floor](https://unovie.ai/solutions/smart-factory-floor.html): Vision-driven inspection and quality control that runs on the line, in real time, on hardware you own — no cloud round-trip, no data egress.
- [Smart Warehouse](https://unovie.ai/solutions/smart-warehouse.html): Edge-AI for inventory and movement: see stock in real time, optimize slotting, and cut stockouts — running where the cameras and sensors already are.
- [OSHA Compliance Monitoring](https://unovie.ai/solutions/osha-compliance.html): AI-powered safety analytics that spot compliance risks — missing PPE, unsafe zones, hazards — and alert in real time, with an evidence trail.
- [Vision Intelligence](https://unovie.ai/solutions/vision-intelligence.html): Real-time computer vision for an OTT and pay-TV operator.
- [Batch Process Optimization](https://unovie.ai/solutions/batch-optimization.html): Automate the optimization of batch processes in chemical and pharmaceutical manufacturing — higher quality, less waste, per batch.
- [Remote Expertise Platform](https://unovie.ai/solutions/remote-expertise.html): Connect remote experts with on-site teams for real-time, grounded guidance — so knowledge scales without the travel.
- [Maritime Digital Twin](https://unovie.ai/solutions/maritime-digital-twin.html): A living digital twin for large tanker and LNG fleets.
- [Connected-Vehicle Digital Twin](https://unovie.ai/solutions/connected-vehicle-twin.html): A VIN-level digital twin for multi-brand connected-EV fleets.
- [Corporate-Travel Sales Intelligence](https://unovie.ai/solutions/corporate-travel-sales.html): An AI co-pilot for an airline corporate-sales team.

## Platform
- [Edge Data Fabric](https://unovie.ai/platform/edge-data-fabric.html): A domain ontology, a knowledge graph and vector memory — one living context layer for everything you know.
- [Edge Streaming Intelligence](https://unovie.ai/platform/edge-streaming-analytics.html): Real-time vision and audio intelligence over live streams, at fleet scale.
- [GPU MicroCloud](https://unovie.ai/platform/gpu-microcloud.html): We stand up a full private cloud on your floor: racks of edge GPUs and servers, software-defined storage, a 10G fabric and a Kubernetes control plane — all on-prem.
- [GPU EdgeGateway](https://unovie.ai/platform/gpu-edgegateway.html): An agent-first, signal-driven gateway — one OpenAI-compatible endpoint that routes every request by intent, modality, cost and privacy across a mesh of local, private and frontier models, runs agents and tools in sandboxed runtimes governed by policy, and learns which path is best.
- [IT/OT Edge Security Intelligence](https://unovie.ai/platform/edge-security-intelligence.html): A GPU-native SIEM that detects threats while the data is still moving.

## Resources
- [Edge AI Models — Field Guide](https://unovie.ai/resources/edge-ai-models.html): a 25-chapter architect's eBook on how edge-AI models actually learn.
- [Frozen-Base Doctrine — Whitepaper](https://unovie.ai/resources/edge-ai-whitepaper.html): adapting custom models on the edge without retraining.

## Company
- [About](https://unovie.ai/about.html): an AI-engineering studio for Industry 4.0, built in Austin, Texas.
- [Contact](https://unovie.ai/contact.html): start a project.

## Machine-readable
- [Full content (llms-full.txt)](https://unovie.ai/llms-full.txt): the entire site as one markdown document for direct LLM/agent consumption.
- [Vector index (JSON)](https://unovie.ai/agents/index.json): embeddable, chunked content records for RAG.
- [Sitemap](https://unovie.ai/sitemap.xml)
